description: Expandable strategic intelligence domains. Domains are broader technical and business scopes; planning_intel news categories remain the AI 10 taxonomy unless a future domain explicitly defines its own final news taxonomy.
rule: Domains are configurable business scopes for planning work. For planning_intel, company SQL category follows config/taxonomy/news_categories.json. Source-side board tags are only source metadata/hints.

domains.name: 人工智能
domains.description: Models, agents, AI applications, AI infrastructure, evaluation, training, inference and ecosystem.

domains.name: 硬件与终端
domains.description: Devices, edge hardware, sensors, terminals, robotics hardware and productized computing platforms.

domains.name: 半导体与算力
domains.description: Chips, accelerators, memory, packaging, foundry, supply chain and compute capacity.

domains.name: 云与基础设施
domains.description: Cloud platforms, data centers, network, storage, middleware and developer infrastructure.

domains.name: 机器人与具身智能
domains.description: Humanoid robots, industrial robotics, embodied intelligence, autonomy and hardware-software integration.

domains.name: 政策与市场
domains.description: Regulation, investment, enterprise adoption, procurement, geopolitics and market structure.

domains.name: 竞品与生态
domains.description: Competitor strategy, product launches, partnerships, pricing, channels and ecosystem moves.

domain_pack_rule.summary: Each domain can add source seeds, taxonomy labels, scoring weights, report templates, prompts and SQL/API export mapping without changing the core pipeline.

legacy_export_note: config/taxonomy/news_categories.json is the default first-level category source for planning_intel generated news and company SQL. config/taxonomy/source_tags.json is source-side metadata only.
